---
title: "Videography in the service of Social Movement Visibility and Interaction Amidst the Pandemic: The case of the Support Art Workers' Initiative in Greece"
author: "Constandinides, C., Papa, V., and Ioannou, M."
date: 2024-01-01
description: "Journal of Popular Communication"
doi: "10.1080/15405702.2024.2393745"
categories: [Applied Political Communication]
image: images_publications/journal-article.png
---

**Link:** [https://doi.org/10.1080/15405702.2024.2393745](https://doi.org/10.1080/15405702.2024.2393745)
